regime_justification: USDJPY grinding toward 160 watch line with subdued vol, JGB yields elevated near 29-year highs (2.66%), BOJ June meeting approaching with interim JGB taper review on agenda; mixed signals as carry intact but policy risk building.

domino_stage.label: Pressure Building
domino_stage.justification: USDJPY at 159.91 (9 pips from 160 MOF line), JGB 10Y at 2.66% (near Apr high of 2.8%), pace accelerating (+1.97% over 1 month), oil elevated at $95.91, BOJ June 12-13 meeting imminent with taper review and rate-hike pricing at 78%.

1w.label: Watchful
1w.driver: BOJ June 12-13 meeting risk; USDJPY 9 pips from 160; applied unwind prior (data alone borderline D, but catalyst proximity warrants C).

2w.label: Watchful
2w.driver: Post-BOJ window; if no hike or MOF intervenes, carry reset extends fragility; JGB taper guidance critical.

3w.label: Unlikely
3w.driver: Event risk passes; if BOJ holds and MOF stays quiet, carry stabilizes; spread 179 bps still wide, vol contained.

4w.label: Unlikely
4w.driver: Absent June surprise, spread + low vol + AI-bid equities sustain carry regime into late summer consolidation phase.

bottom_line: Stage 1 Pressure Building. USDJPY 159.91, nine pips from 160, pace +1.97%/month; JGB 10Y 2.66% near 29-year peak; BOJ June 12-13 meeting looms with 78% hike pricing and JGB taper interim review. Spread 179 bps, FX vol subdued (7-8% range), VIX 16, MOVE unavailable. Oil $95.91, BTC $67k (down 47% from ATH), Nikkei 66.7k. Grade C/C/D/D: watchful through BOJ event, then stabilization if no shock. Carry mechanics intact but fragile—one hawkish surprise or MOF salvo flips the table. No false calm; this is a loaded setup.

Subdued vs April peak; complacency signal despite proximity to 160

trigger_map.note: USDJPY 159.91, 9 pips from 160; MOF hasn't intervened since May Golden Week (155→157 spike); rate-check rumors absent but proximity = armed.
June 12-13 meeting; markets price 78% hike probability; even a dovish hold with hawkish taper guidance could compress spread fast.

trigger_map.trigger: JGB 10Y break above prior cycle high
trigger_map.note: Currently 2.66%, April high 2.8%; 14 bps buffer. BOJ taper interim review could send it through if guidance aggressive.

trigger_map.trigger: Energy / Hormuz shock pushing ¥/bbl > prior peak
trigger_map.note: WTI $95.91, ¥/bbl 15,344; March peak was $119 Brent. Hormuz talks ongoing; closure risk latent but oil bid pressures BOJ.

narrative.p1: USDJPY at 159.91, nine pips below the 160 MOF watch line that triggered intervention in April/May. Quiet overnight; pair drifted -0.05% as US 10Y rose 3 bps to 4.49% and JGB 10Y climbed 3 bps to 2.66%, holding near two-week lows but only 14 bps shy of the April 2.8% spike (29-year high). Oil up 2.3% to $95.91 on Iran-US ceasefire uncertainty. No fresh BOJ/MOF headlines; stage unchanged from yesterday (Pressure Building, Stage 1) but BOJ June 12-13 meeting now 9 days out—markets pricing 78% hike probability and interim JGB taper assessment on the docket. VIX 16, Nikkei 66.7k near ATH, BTC down 6.3% to $67k as AI rotation bleeds crypto. No domino has tipped, but the table is tilting.
narrative.p2: US-JP 10Y spread 179 bps (4.49% - 2.66%) = still wide carry terrain, but JGB at 2.66% signals fiscal/BOJ taper stress persisting. Carry-to-vol proxy unavailable (1M vol data sparse; estimates 7-8% annualized per recent commentary). USDJPY pace: +1.97% over 1 month, above the ~1.5%/month threshold that historically triggers MOF rhetoric. Distance from 60d mean: elevated but orderly grind, not parabolic. The setup: spread intact, vol subdued, but USDJPY 9 pips from intervention line and BOJ decision 9 days away with 78% hike pricing. Grade 1w/2w = C (Watchful). Applied unwind prior as tiebreaker: data alone borderline D (spread wide, vol low, no headlines), but June 12-13 catalyst proximity + USDJPY at 160 doorstep + JGB taper interim review = sufficient fragility to lean one notch more alert. Grade 3w/4w = D (Unlikely): if BOJ holds or hikes modestly without MOF follow-through, carry resets and pressure eases into summer doldrums. Not complacent—this is a loaded dice roll, not a false alarm.
narrative.p3: BTC $67k, down 6.3% on the day and 47% from the $126k March ATH. Oil above $95 is choking risk appetite and crypto liquidity; WTI crossed $110 in March and BTC fell 44% in lockstep (Phemex data). The pattern persists: when oil > $100, crypto struggles as Fed hike expectations lock in and speculative capital rotates to Treasuries/cash. BTC-DXY correlation data unavailable, but qualitatively BTC is trading as high-beta risk-off, not digital gold—gold itself near $4,550 (up YTD) while BTC bleeds. Open interest direction unclear from search but the -6.3% move suggests leveraged long flush. For crypto positioning: oil trajectory is the liquidity valve. If Brent drifts back toward $90 post-Iran deal, BTC recovery window opens toward $75-80k. If Hormuz escalates and oil tests $110+, BTC retests $60k support with ETF inflows the only bid. The June 12-13 BOJ meeting matters for crypto too—yen shock 2.0 (Aug'24 analog) would cascade into leveraged unwinds across all risk. Stay hedged, size for the scenario you don't believe.

horizon_rationale.w1_w2: Week 1 dominated by BOJ June 12-13 meeting: hike probability 78%, JGB taper interim review, and Ueda presser. Even a hold with hawkish taper guidance compresses spread and spikes JGB vol. USDJPY 9 pips from 160 means MOF on standby. Weeks 1-2 both grade C because post-meeting window (week 2) carries execution risk—if BOJ hikes or signals faster normalization, carry unwind accelerates; if MOF intervenes, vol regime shifts. The catalyst is binary and imminent.
horizon_rationale.w2_w3: Week 2 to 3: event risk passes. If BOJ holds and MOF stays quiet, markets exhale and USDJPY drifts back toward 157-158 as carry repositions. Grade drops from C to D because the known catalyst resolves and spread (179 bps) + subdued vol reassert the carry regime. However, if BOJ surprises hawkish or MOF intervenes in week 2, week 3 becomes a damage-control/liquidation phase (grade would be B or A, not D). The D grade assumes base case: no shock.
horizon_rationale.w3_w4: Weeks 3-4 flatten to D (Unlikely) under base case. Summer doldrums, AI-driven equity bid (Nikkei 66.7k, S&P near ATH), oil drifting lower if Iran deal lands, and carry spread still 179 bps. The unwind thesis needs a shock to trigger; absent June 12-13 fireworks, the setup decompresses into range-bound consolidation. The 4w grade is directional/scenario-weighted, not predictive: if the BOJ June meeting passes quietly, July/August look stable. If it doesn't, all bets off and this brief is obsolete.

watch_list: BOJ June 12-13 decision: hike, hold, or taper guidance shift—any hawkish surprise compresses carry instantly.
USDJPY break of 160.00: triggers MOF intervention playbook (April/May analog); even rate-check rumors spike vol.
JGB 10Y above 2.80%: prior cycle high; break signals fiscal stress overwhelming BOJ taper gradualism.
Oil trajectory: WTI above $100 = Fed higher-for-longer + crypto liquidation; below $90 = risk-on recovery window.
Nikkei reaction to BOJ: Aug'24 analog—15bp hike crashed Nikkei 12.4%; watch for equity-yen decoupling breakdown.
